summary: AI Practice Lead setting the AI engineering direction at a regulated fintech — shipping production agents, defining the stack, and driving org-wide AI adoption. 5+ years building cloud-native systems with Python, FastAPI, and AWS. CKA certified with production Kubernetes experience. Recently shipped a production RAG backend with intent classification, hybrid retrieval, LLM reranking, and streaming responses — treating LLMs as infrastructure, not experiments.

AWS (EKS, SQS, S3, Lambda), Kubernetes (CKA), Docker, Helm, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD
Software Solution Architecture, Microservices, REST APIs, Async Programming, TDD, Mentoring

experience.title: AI Practice Lead
